category_sources: source_facts.description says Komac is a Community Manifest Creator for Windows Package Manager (WinGet).
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is komac; source_facts.homepage points to the official RussellBanks/Komac repository using Komac.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official GitHub repository; its README is the best official documentation surface identified.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already provides https://github.com/russellbanks/Komac, so repo is returned as null per instructions.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies WinGet manifest creation; source_facts.executables lists the komac CLI.
